heading: Nonvoting stock
label: 285 Nonvoting stock
text: Stock not held by member banks shall not be entitled to voting power.
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of the eleventh par. of section 2 of act . For classification of other pars. of section 2 of this Act, see Codification note set out under .Dec. 23, 1913section 222 of this title
